FIELD_DESCRIPTION: The month/day/year the incident took place
The county or parish where the patient was found or to which the unit responded (or best approximation)
Description of the complaint that was reported to dispatch
The anatomic location of the patient's chief complaint
The patient's primary symptom
The provider 's primary impression
The known disposition of the patient from the Emergency Department (ED)
Indication of how the patient was dispositioned from the hospital, if admitted
Flag indicating injury to the patient
A flag that indicates whether or not naloxone was given
Flag indicating the provider gave the patient medication
Type of destination to which the resonding unit transferred the patient.
Structure under which the EMS provider operates (e.g. Fire Department, Private Nonhospital, Hospital, Community Nonprofit, etc.)
Type of service the EMS provider providers (e.g. 911 Response w/ Transport, 911 Response w/out Transport, Air Medical, Hazmat, etc.)
Service level the EMS provider provides (e.g. EMT-Basic, EMT-Intermediate, First Responder, etc.)
Number of minutes for the time it took for the provider to arrive on the scene
Number of minutes for the time it took for the provider to reach the destination from the scene
Date the provider's unit was initially notified
Date the provider's unit arrived on the scene
Date the provider's unit initially came in contact with the patient
Date the provider's unit left the scene
Date the patient arrived at the destination
